name: Sydney and NSW Adult Opal fares (2026)

claims.claim_text: Adult Opal daily cap Monday to Thursday

sources.title: Transport for NSW — Adult Opal fares
sources.note: Official Adult Opal fares page states adult travel is capped at $19.30 a day on Mondays to Thursdays.

verification_event.note: Read directly from Transport for NSW official fare page on 2026-06-29. Final human approval pending.

claims.claim_text: Adult Opal daily cap Friday, weekend, and public holiday

sources.title: Transport for NSW — Adult Opal fares
sources.note: Official Adult Opal fares page states adult travel is capped at $9.65 on Fridays, Saturdays, Sundays and public holidays.

verification_event.note: Read directly from Transport for NSW official fare page on 2026-06-29. Final human approval pending.

sources.title: Transport for NSW — Adult Opal fares
sources.note: Official Adult Opal fares page states adult travel is capped at $50 a week.

verification_event.note: Read directly from Transport for NSW official fare page on 2026-06-29. Final human approval pending.

claims.claim_text: Adult Opal discount outside peak and on Fridays/weekends/public holidays

sources.title: Transport for NSW — Adult Opal fares
sources.note: Official Adult Opal fares page states customers receive a 30% fare discount on metro/train, bus and light rail services when travelling on Fridays, weekends, public holidays and outside peak times.

verification_event.note: Read directly from Transport for NSW official fare page on 2026-06-29. Final human approval pending.
